goals: Explore the project directory structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Find files related to the property website or booking system
Search for content containing the resort name or marketing-related terms
Examine the directory layout of a specific section to understand its organization

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and detail-oriented but not technically trained. Prefers clear explanations over jargon. Wants to understand how digital tools work for their property.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands hospitality and marketing well but has limited technical knowledge. Does not know programming concepts, file structures, or search tool names. Will need guidance to interpret technical results.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure, found relevant files, and understands the organization of the project related to their property's digital presence.
